payload.description: Bus priority project on Flatbush Avenue from Tillary Street to Kings Plaza through downtown Brooklyn to southern Brooklyn. A collaborative effort between NYC DOT and MTA to improve transit service, including bus lanes, busways, automated enforcement, and transit signal priority.
